qa_pairs.answer: The SHA256 hash for the RSA key on Niagara is `k6YEhYsI73M+NJIpZ8yF+wqWeuXS9avNs2s5QS/0VhU`.

qa_pairs.answer: The RSA key type on Niagara has a SHA256 value of `k6YEhYsI73M+NJIpZ8yF+wqWeuXS9avNs2s5QS/0VhU`.

qa_pairs.answer: The full domain name for the `ssh-test` entry is `ssh-test.computecanada.ca`.
